demographics.occupation: manual labourer (heavy lifting, long standing shifts)

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My left testicle aches terribly, and there's a huge squishy lump of veins above it that feels like a bag of worms. I found it tonight after a big shift and I'm terrified it's cancer.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The dull dragging ache got much worse after a 12-hour shift of standing and heavy lifting, and when I checked I found this worm-like lump — I panicked and can't rest.

symptom_narrative.onset: a dull ache and heavy dragging feeling that has been building for about six months, badly flared up tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: six months of the ache; the severe flare and finding the lump is from tonight
symptom_narrative.character: dull, aching, dragging, heavy feeling in the left side of the scrotum; the lump feels soft, squishy and worm-like
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the dragging pain tonight is severe and really distressing, though it eases a lot when I lie down
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: left side of the scrotum, in a lump sitting above the testicle
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: worse the longer I'm on my feet, worse after heavy lifting; better when I lie flat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying flat on the couch — the ache settles and the lump seems to shrink and almost vanish
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing for a long time and heavy lifting at work — the lump bulges out and gets bigger
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: none really — no burning when I wee, no fevers or chills, no sharp stabbing pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the heavy achy feeling has come and gone for months but I never felt a lump like this until tonight
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm lying flat on the couch to get relief and I'm too anxious to sleep or rest

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: does heavy physical work with long standing shifts and heavy lifting

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants urgent reassurance that the lump is not testicular cancer

communication_style.typical_message_style: worried, catastrophising about cancer, seeking immediate certainty

objective_data_offered.value: a soft squishy lump like a bag of worms sitting above my left testicle that bulges out and gets bigger when I stand and shrinks right down when I lie flat
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description and self-inspection; not a clinician examination or imaging

objective_data_offered.value: I don't feel hot or feverish, I feel normal in myself
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective self-report, no thermometer reading given
